title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 14 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 14 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 14 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/05/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures held up well, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 737, up 2.43% for the day. Traders were relativelyactive in selling, while steel mills purchased as needed. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
